title: silene pusilla subsp. malyi
intro: Silene pusilla subsp. malyi, also known as a type of alpine catchfly, is a plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. Its health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve antioxidant defenses, making it a popular choice among herbal practitioners. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
